title: Mera Pati Sirf Mera Hai
desc: Roopa leads a lavish lifestyle and is disrespectful to her husband, Prakash. But when she suspects that her new neighbour is trying to woo Prakash, she goes to all extremes to destroy her.

title: Nalayak
desc: Laxman's brother, Ram Narayan, in an attempt to settle a matter involving fake jewelry, gets wrongly framed. To prove his brother's innocence, Laxman vows to get to the bottom of the issue.

title: Tada
desc: Balraj, an honest man, joins hands with a gangster in order to avenge his father's death. However, his upstanding brother Ajay opposes him as a police inspector.

title: Sumeru
desc: A man desperately searching for his father meets a woman headed to her wedding. As the two collaborate on his mission, they find themselves falling in love.

title: Sankoch
desc: Shekar and Lalita, two childhood friends from different social classes, secretly love each other. However, due to societal barriers they struggle to fulfill their childhood dream of being together.

title: Dear Maya
desc: Anna and Ira, two young women, begin a prank by sending letters to a local woman under the guise of a secret admirer. However, things take a turn for the worse when she goes missing.
